<blockquote>This is where you can find all of the '''necessary documentation''' to be assisted in '''building upon or extending Doggy Talents Next,''' either through 

contributions directly to the base source code, assets, or external means like resource packs.</blockquote>
[[File:Code dogs.png|center|955x955px]]


Depending on which group your intentions classify on, proceed through the following:

=== '''Contributing''' to the Base: ===
* [[Setting up your Dev Environment]].
* Start Implementing Things. (WIP).

=== '''Extending''' the Project: ===

==== [[How to add more skins through Resource Packs?|'''Resource Packs''' - Adding more '''Skins''']]. ====

==== '''Addons''' - Implementing more '''Models'''. ====
* [[How to make your models DTN compatible?]]
* [[How to implement your models into DTN?]]
